title: Feeding My Husband | #shorts
full_text: shelab have some watermelon looks so good I know you know one thing I've always wondered how come there no seeds in these watermelons there's not a single one I think the machines remove I don't know there's a magical waterm the machines remove It in America I think I don't know my God you know what I just realized what all those years growing up in India it was my mom that was REM removing these seeds with their own two hands you're so lucky that you don't have you do that for me
